title: Dynamic Alerting Platform — Tenant→Orgs Schema (_tenant_orgs.yaml, ADR-027 / LD-6 P4a)
description: JSON Schema (draft-07) for validating _tenant_orgs.yaml — the admin-only tenant→organization mapping backing the org-scope authz axis. Mirrors the STRICT (yaml KnownFields) parser in components/tenant-api/internal/tenantorg/tenantorg.go (Config.TenantOrgs map[string][]string): a typo'd top-level key (`tenant_org:` for `tenant_orgs:`) that the runtime rejects as a load error is caught here at author / CI time instead — a silent empty map would make every org-scoped rule behave as if no tenant has any org. An empty / comment-only / absent file is the one benign empty case. Present-but-null values are accepted wherever the parser accepts them: `tenant_orgs:` and `db-a:` both decode to nil WITHOUT a load error, and a nil org list is indistinguishable from `[]` — the documented, tested 'created-but-unassigned' state — so the schema never rejects a config the parser accepts. Org codes must be non-blank strings (an authoring hygiene guard: a blank code is inert in Go but almost always a mistake).

tenant_orgs.title: Tenant → Orgs map
tenant_orgs.description: Mapping of tenant ID → list of organization codes it belongs to (1:N). An empty or null list = created-but-unassigned (labeled, no org yet).
